info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Subscriber Management API
info.description: The Subscriber Management API enables businesses to onboard and manage subscribers effectively. This endpoint facilitates the registration of new subscribers, allowing organizations to expand their customer base and enhance engagement. Typical consumers of this API include marketing teams and customer relationship managers who require streamlined processes for managing subscription services. Utilize this API to initiate subscription workflows and improve overall user experience.

post.summary: Create a new subscriber for a customer.
post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new subscriber associated with a specific customer. Provide the necessary details in the request body to successfully register the subscriber.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new subscriber within the customers' subscription service. It is crucial to provide the necessary details in the specified format to successfully add the subscriber to the system.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

200.description: The request was successfully completed, returning the requested data.

404.description: The requested resource was not found on the server.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A more detailed message providing additional information about the error.
message.example: Unable to process subscriber activation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace identifier to assist in debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on how to potentially resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: Schema representing a response for an error scenario during the subscriber operation.

example.message: Unable to process subscriber activation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving subscriber details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer associated with the error.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the error that occurred.

message.description: A message providing additional context about the error.
message.example: Subscriber with the given ID does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: This schema captures detailed information about an error that occurred during a subscriber operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Subscriber Response

subscriberId.description: The unique identifier for the subscriber.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the subscriber.

msisdn.description: The mobile subscriber integrated service digital network number.

plan.description: The subscription plan associated with the subscriber.

network.description: The network provider associated with the subscriber's plan.

status.description: The current status of the subscription.

message.description: Additional information or messages regarding the subscription operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: Schema representing the response returned upon a successful subscription operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Customer Subscription Request

msisdn.description: Mobile Station International Subscriber Directory Number, a unique phone number for the subscriber.

plan.description: Subscription plan the customer is signing up for.

network.description: Network operator that the subscription will be associated with.

activationDate.description: Date when the subscription will be activated, in ISO 8601 format.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a new customer subscription.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Error Response for Subscriber Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the nature of the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for subscriber activation.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that was accessed.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the client on how to remedy the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer information and retry the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: This schema represents the error response returned when a subscriber operation fails with a 404 status. It includes details about the error and possible suggestions for the client.

example.message: Customer details not found for subscriber activation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer information and retry the request.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
